description_long: This is a wooden bed frame with a classic panel design, featuring a tall, arched headboard and a lower footboard, both with decorative paneling. The frame is painted in a light gray or off-white color, with natural wood accents along the top edges of the headboard and footboard. The bed has evenly spaced wooden slats running horizontally to support a mattress, and a central support beam for added stability. The legs are turned and slightly tapered, giving the bed a traditional, elegant appearance. No mattress or bedding is present, leaving the slatted base fully visible. The overall construction suggests durability and a timeless aesthetic suitable for both modern and traditional urban interiors.
description: A classic wooden bed frame with a tall, arched headboard, decorative paneling, and exposed wooden slats. The frame is painted light gray with natural wood accents and features turned legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, arched headboard with panel details and the full width of the slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bed, the slatted support system, and the profile of the headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard, showing its panel design and the absence of slats or mattress from this angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length of the bed, the slatted base, and the turned legs.
